caption: A young man with glasses and medium-length brown hair stands in a room with plain gray walls and a whiteboard in the background. He is wearing a black t-shirt featuring a graphic of a face and the text "K n th", along with a blue lanyard and a white identification badge clipped to his shirt. He maintains a posture with his left hand resting on his hip throughout the sequence. He is speaking and gesturing with his right hand; initially, his palm is open and facing upward. As time progresses, he closes his hand into a loose fist and then brings his fingers up to touch his right cheek and temple. A black chair is partially visible in the lower foreground of the scene. The setting remains static as the man continues his explanation, with only his facial expressions and right-hand movements changing.
